:map 2 
:tags bathroom  
:scriptA bathtoilet -1 movey 
:scriptB restsink -1 movey 
:scriptC stall -1 movey 
:scriptD wallshower skel 
:scriptE 5 %chance if threeburst then 
:size 15 10 
:off 5 0

:map 3

:scriptA cellbars -0.3 movey

:scriptD 2 3 rnd for pipebomb next
